programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In 2013, the small city of Weatherford, Texas was rocked by the brutal slaying of local son, JD Doss. The murder weapon? A pickaxe. The murderer? His close friend, 24-year-old Nicholas Camfield. In a shocking twist, Camfield not only killed his victim by repeatedly striking him in the head, he also mutilated, scalped, and defiled his body over the course of days. In one of David Scott's most shocking interviews, Camfield gives a glimpse inside his deranged, murderous mind.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In his first ever television interview, killer Thomas Gilbert, Jr. discusses the murder that shook New York's elite. The Princeton-educated Gilbert became a tabloid obsession when he shot his father after his $1,000 allowance was cut off. But in this unique installment of Interview With a Killer, Gilbert appears to be a far cry from his once golden upbringing. Host David Scott explores his long history of mental illness and the privileged pressure cooker that shaped his downfall.

programme.title: The Three Stooges Meet Hercules
programme.desc: The Three Stooges work at Dimsel’s Drug Store where they befriend Schuyler Davis, the owner of the shop next door, who is attempting to build a time machine. With the boys “help,” the time machine transports the boys, Schuyler and his girlfriend Diane back in time to ancient Greece during the reign of the lecherous King Oedious, a distant ancestor of Dimsel. Odius has a yearning for Diane, and banishes Schuyler and the boys into servitude at sea. After a shipwreck, The Three Stooges and Schuyler escape. In the Gladiator arena, they bill Schuyler as Hercules. The real Hercules gets wind of their game and confronts them, but the Stooges convince Hercules to help them rescue Diane and return the rightful king to the throne.

programme.title: Forbidden Science - Clone Fantasy

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Still reeling from a mission briefing from the CIA, the contestants are thrown into a punishment for breaking protocol. It’s safe to say the contestants are having a sobering morning. However, the contestants are given a minor reprieve when Don assigns them to some stretch PT to give them a break before the ropes course gauntlet in the afternoon.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The path to mission readiness takes a sharp turn as contestants are introduced to the Cupolster—an innovative holster system that changes the game when seconds matter. Don delivers a critical safety lesson before the team puts the gear to the test, running a demanding course of fire from inside a truck. From standard draws to Cupolster drills, every move is about speed, precision, and survival under pressure. The action escalates with a SAR9 passenger-seat course of fire that leaves contestants breathless —proving that combat can come from anywhere, at any time. But the real trial begins when Ken Shamrock unleashes his legendary Iron Man challenge. In three-minute elimination rounds, contestants go toe-to-toe against each other, testing not only strength but everything they’ve absorbed under Shamrock’s punishing guidance. It’s survival of the fittest—where only the toughest, sharpest, and most disciplined will walk away victorious.

programme.title: Journey Through Corsica
programme.desc: Journey Through Corsica – Full Length Film (4K) | NatureStream.tv Embark on a breathtaking aerial and sea-level journey across the wild west coast of Corsica — where red granite cliffs plunge into turquoise coves, and the Mediterranean meets raw island wilderness. programme.title: Fjords & Waterfalls of Norway
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring waterfalls and fjords of Norway in this 90 minute relaxing nature film. Soar down plummeting waterfalls and over the dramatic cliffs that plunge into the blue waters of remote fjords. Glimpse historic fishing villages accessible only by boat and relax to the calming soundtrack that accompanies the inspiring scenery.

programme.title: Journey Through the Dolomites
programme.desc: Explore the jagged, vertical world of the Italian Alps. Watch the sun set over limestone peaks and emerald meadows, casting a warm glow over one of the most unique and beautiful mountain ranges on earth.

programme.title: TV Art Displays
programme.desc: This beautiful collection of landscape photographs turns your TV into a framed art display.

programme.title: California's Wild Coast
programme.desc: Soar with the seabirds over the wild and beautiful north coast of California. The rugged coastline of Mendocino is a vast wilderness full of wildlife, sea caves, bird colonies, and crashing waves that can only be fully appreciated from an aerial view. This 2.5 hour film is an exhilarating flight over this magnificent landscape. Soul stirring ambient music accompanies the spectacular cinematography of "California's Wild Coast"

programme.title: The Big Trees 1952
programme.desc: A ruthless timber tycoon attempts to swindle peaceful homesteaders out of their land in the California redwood forests, only to undergo a change of heart when he faces their resilience and natural beauty

programme.title: The Belle Starr Story (1968)
programme.desc: A fictionalized account of the legendary outlaw, depicting her transformation from a defiant woman into a notorious gunslinger who leads a gang of bandits in the post-Civil War West

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 12 The Savage
programme.desc: While traveling through Shoshone territory, Adam Cartwright is ambushed by Indians and left for dead. He is rescued and nursed back to health by a mysterious mountain woman known to the tribe as the "White Buffalo Woman"—whom Adam discovers is actually a white woman named Ruth Halversen. Because the tribe believes Ruth has lost her sacred healing powers, they have sentenced her to death, but her ability to heal Adam's wounds gives her a chance to save her own life

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 9 Breed of Violence
programme.desc: When Joe Cartwright is accused of murder after a violent confrontation in a nearby town, Ben Cartwright must race against time and a vengeful sheriff to prove his son's innocence before he is subjected to mob justice

programme.title: The Big Cat (1949)
programme.desc: An escaped convict hiding out in the mountains finds redemption when he helps a local family protect their home and their livestock from a predatory cougar that is terrorizing the rural community.

programme.title: Far Frontier
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks. Border Patrolman Tom Sharper intercepts one of the trucks but is overpowered and left for dead

programme.title: Stormy Trails 1936
programme.desc: In Stormy Trails, cowboy hero Rex Bell saddles up for a fight against greed and betrayal on the frontier. When a ruthless schemer sets his sights on stealing valuable ranch land, Bell rides into action to defend the homesteaders and uncover the truth. With galloping chases, blazing gunfights, and plenty of Western grit, this action-packed adventure proves that justice can weather any storm.

programme.title: Keoma The Avenger 1976
programme.desc: In Keoma the Avenger, Franco Nero stars as a half-breed gunslinger who returns home from the Civil War to find his town enslaved by tyranny and violence. Haunted by visions and driven by a fierce sense of justice, Keoma faces his ruthless half-brothers and a brutal warlord in a struggle for freedom. With its haunting atmosphere, gritty violence, and powerful performances, this Spaghetti Western classic blends myth and vengeance into an unforgettable tale.

programme.title: Death Rides The Range 1939
programme.desc: In Death Rides the Range, a band of ruthless spies schemes to steal America’s uranium supply, but they didn’t count on the Three Mesquiteers! Leaping into action, the daring trio battles danger on the open frontier, matching fists, six-guns, and wits against a deadly enemy. Packed with intrigue, hard-riding action, and patriotic spirit, this adventure delivers Western thrills with a timely twist.

programme.title: Gunman From Bodie
programme.desc: Buck poses as a wanted killer and Sandy as a cook as the trio help ranchers stop a ruthless crook from taking over the area s water rights and help an orphaned baby.
